items.description:
[ SCORCH // AZURE YELLOW SWEATPANTS LOOSE ]

Upgrade your streetwear game with the SCORCH Azure Contrast Yellow Sweatpants. These loose-fit joggers are designed for the ultimate Y2K Sporty aesthetic, featuring a vibrant yellow base with bold azure blue graffiti accents. Engineered for a relaxed, baggy look that stays trendy in any game.

🔥 DETAILS:

Brand: Official SCORCH Signature.
Fit: Ultra Loose / Baggy Sweatpants Silhouette.
Design: Azure Blue graffiti "S" with playful character embroidery.
Style: Perfect for Y2K Sporty, Cybercore, and Urban Streetwear.

🔗 MATCHING:
Wear the full set! Get the "SCORCH Azure Contrast Yellow Hoodie Boxy Crop" in our group store now.
